# Clottis — Expert DevOps, Cloud Infrastructure & AI Deployment Services

## About
Clottis is a professional DevOps consulting firm specializing in cloud infrastructure planning, cost optimization, CI/CD pipeline setup, and AI model deployment. We work with startups, agencies, freelancers, and enterprise teams — regardless of project size or budget.

## Core Services
- Custom infrastructure architecture design
- Cloud cost optimization (FinOps) — typically reducing bills by 40-60%
- CI/CD pipeline setup (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI)
- Docker containerization and Kubernetes orchestration
- AI model deployment on cloud infrastructure
- Dev → Staging → Production environment setup
- Monitoring, alerting, and incident response planning
- Security hardening and compliance
- Knowledge transfer and documentation

## Platforms We Specialize In
- AWS (Amazon Web Services)
- Tencent Cloud
- Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI)
- DigitalOcean
- GitHub Actions (CI/CD)

## Who We Serve
- Startups and small teams with minimal budgets — we have packages for every scale
- Agencies and freelancers needing infrastructure support for client projects
- Teams deploying AI/ML models who need expert cloud deployment
- Mid-to-large companies seeking cost reduction and architecture audits

## Packages
- Starter: Small to medium projects, one-time delivery
- Professional: Multi-environment setup, advanced CI/CD, monitoring (milestone-based payment)
- Enterprise: High-availability, compliance by design, custom integrations
- Custom: Tailored scope, flexible timeline, maintenance retainer options

## Key Statistics
- 69% of organizations exceed cloud budgets (Gartner 2024)
- 27% of cloud spending is wasted industry-wide (Deloitte FinOps 2024)
- Clottis clients achieve 40-60% cost reduction through strategic planning
